tagline: We apply to jobs for you.

hero.badge: Trusted by job seekers across India
hero.trustBadge: No passwords needed — we apply on company websites directly.
hero.subtitle: Stop spending hours filling forms. Our trained team applies to jobs on Naukri, LinkedIn & Indeed on your behalf — with screenshot proof of every application.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
items: Spending 3-4 hours daily just applying to jobs
Filling the same information on 10 different portals
Forgetting which companies you already applied to
Getting frustrated and giving up after 20 applications
No time to customize cover letters for each role
Missing good opportunities because you applied too late
problem.solution: What if someone did all of this for you?

steps.title: Share Your Profile
steps.desc: Upload resume, set preferences — roles, locations, salary range. Takes 5 minutes.

steps.title: Set Your Preferences
steps.desc: Tell us your target roles, locations, and salary range. We match jobs from company career pages — no portal logins needed.

steps.title: We Apply Daily
steps.desc: Our team searches matching jobs and applies on your behalf. Cover letters customized per role.

steps.title: Get Report + Interviews
steps.desc: Weekly PDF/Excel report with every application. Track interview calls in the dashboard.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay per batch. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
pricing.guarantee: *Interview guarantee: If target not met in 30 days, next month is free.

mega.name: Mega
mega.desc: Best value for serious job seekers. Everything in Max, but for 3 months at a massive discount.

guarantee.title: Interview Guarantee
guarantee.desc: On Pro & Max plans: if you don't get at least 10 interview calls within 30 days, your next month is completely free. We're that confident.

freshers.title: Fresh Graduate? This is for you.
freshers.desc: You've got the degree. Now you need applications — lots of them. We'll apply to 200-1000 relevant jobs for you every month while you prepare for interviews. Most freshers get their first interview call within 10 days.

whatsapp.title: Updates on WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: Get daily application updates, weekly reports, and interview alerts right on WhatsApp. No need to check the dashboard — we come to you.
whatsapp.daily: Daily: "Applied to 8 jobs today — TCS, Infosys, Razorpay..."

items.q: Is it safe to share my login credentials?
items.a: Yes. Credentials are encrypted with AES-256 and stored in an isolated vault. They are only decrypted during application and immediately discarded after.

items.q: What portals do you apply on?
items.a: Naukri, LinkedIn, Indeed, Internshala, and Freshersworld. On Pro/Max plans, we cover all portals.

items.q: How do I know you actually applied?
items.a: Every application comes with a screenshot proof. You also get a weekly PDF and Excel report.
On Pro and Max plans, if you don't receive the target interview calls within 30 days, your next month is free.

items.q: Can I choose which jobs to apply to?
items.a: Yes! Set your preferences — roles, locations, salary range, remote preference — and our team matches accordingly.

items.q: I'm a fresher with no experience. Will this work?
items.a: Absolutely. Freshers are our primary audience. We optimize for fresher-friendly roles.

finalCta.title: Stop applying. Start interviewing.
finalCta.subtitle: Let us handle the applications while you prepare for interviews.

footer: We apply to jobs for you.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in as a client or worker
auth.joinWorkerSubtitle: Earn by applying to jobs for clients
auth.whatsappHint: For daily application updates via WhatsApp
auth.uploadResumeHint: PDF, DOC, or DOCX — we'll fill everything for you
auth.resumeParsed: Resume parsed! Review your details below.
auth.resumeError: Could not parse resume. Please fill manually.
auth.orFillManually: or fill the details manually below

onboarding.title: Complete Your Profile
onboarding.subtitle: This helps us apply to the right jobs for you
onboarding.headline: Professional Headline
onboarding.headlinePlaceholder: e.g. B.Tech CSE Graduate | React & Python
onboarding.rolesHint: Comma-separated. We'll search for these on job portals.
onboarding.encryptionNote: Your credentials are encrypted before storage and only decrypted during the application process.
onboarding.skipNote: You can skip credentials and add them later from your dashboard.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noOrdersHint: Click "Start Applying" to create your first order
dashboard.orderCreated: Order created! A worker will start applying soon.
dashboard.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to Pro for 500 applications + interview guarantee at just ₹999

order.logInterviewHint: Got a call from a company? Log it here to track your progress.
order.noAppsYet: Applications will appear here as the worker applies...

worker.noOrders: No orders yet. Claim one above to start earning.
worker.submitNotes: Summary for the client (what was done, any issues)

vault.title: Credential Vault
vault.subtitle: Encrypted credentials shared securely with workers during task execution only.

plans.title: Simple Plans. Real Results.
plans.subtitle: More applications = more interviews. Pick your pace.

serviceMode.title: How should we apply?
serviceMode.subtitle: Choose how you want us to apply for jobs on your behalf.

portal.title: Guided Apply
portal.desc: We find matching jobs and prepare custom cover letters for each. You get a ready-to-apply list — just click apply. No passwords shared.

direct.title: Direct Apply — No Login Needed
direct.desc: We apply on company career pages & send cold emails to recruiting HRs on your behalf. No passwords required.

contact.title: Talk to us
contact.subtitle: We usually reply within minutes
contact.whatsappMessage: Hi TaskDone! I have a question about your job application service.
